0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Vector Search"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Dense embedding-based similarity search using ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," for efficient nearest-neighbor queries."]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"How It Works"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embed"}],": Query text is converted to a vector via OpenAI embeddings"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Search"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," performs approximate nearest neighbor search"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Score"}],": Cosine similarity between query and stored vectors"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rank"}],": Results ordered by similarity (highest first)"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# OpenAI embeddings (default)\nmem = Memory(embedding_model=\"text-embedding-3-small\")\n\n# Or use local embeddings (no API calls)\nmem = Memory(\n  embedding_model=\"sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2\",\n  local_embeddings=True,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Supported Models"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Model | Dimensions | Speed | Quality | Cost |\n|-------|-----------|-------|---------|------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"text-embedding-3-small"}]," | 1536 | Fast | Good | $0.02/1M |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"text-embedding-3-large"}]," | 3072 | Medium | Excellent | $0.13/1M |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"all-MiniLM-L6-v2"}]," | 384 | Very Fast | Moderate | Free (local) |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Direct Vector Queries"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Search by text (auto-embeds)\nresults = mem.vector_search(\"deployment strategy\")\n\n# Search with custom vector\nresults = mem.vector_search(vector=my_custom_vector)\n\n# Filtered vector search\nresults = mem.vector_search(\n  \"deployment strategy\",\n  tags=[\"infrastructure\"],\n  threshold=0.7,  # Minimum similarity\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Index Management"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Rebuild vector index (after bulk imports)\nmem.rebuild_vector_index()\n\n# Check index status\nstatus = mem.vector_index_status()\nprint(f\"Indexed: {status.entry_count}\")\nprint(f\"Dimensions: {status.dimensions}\")\nprint(f\"Last build: {status.last_build}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Performance Characteristics"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Dataset Size | Query Time | Index Size |\n|--------------|-----------|------------|\n| 1K entries | 15ms | 6MB |\n| 10K entries | 35ms | 60MB |\n| 100K entries | 85ms | 600MB |\n| 1M entries | 250ms | 6GB |"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 Search"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}]," uses approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) search. Results are highly accurate but not guaranteed to be exact. For exact search, combine with FTS5 filtering."]}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/1324ugbfcq7x6.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"hOmP2Cy-yrrgTKgwHamoc"}
